# Author/committer emails allowed on NEW commits published to the public mirror.
# The publish gate (scripts/publish-to-public.sh, "author-identity gate") blocks
# a publish when any newly-published commit carries an email not on this list —
# private/personal addresses must never reach public history. Every entry here
# is an already-public GitHub identity (noreply addresses / bots). When a new
# legitimate identity starts landing commits (contributor credit, a new bot),
# add its email via PR.
10135422+talasa@users.noreply.github.com
46425736+asafna2@users.noreply.github.com
41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com
49699333+dependabot[bot]@users.noreply.github.com
noreply@github.com
